title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at BHIVE Workspace

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at BHIVE Workspace
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
